infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Local Guide uses your location to provide information about nearby landmarks and points of interest.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Local Guide uses your location to provide information about nearby landmarks and points of interest.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Local Guide uses your background location to automatically tell you about interesting nearby places.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Local Guide uses speech recognition so you can talk to your guide hands-free.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Local Guide needs microphone access for voice conversations with your guide.
